first_impression.description: One or two sentences: what the language felt like to write, before any grading context.

confusions.description: Every point where you were unsure what the language wanted. Empty array if none.

where.description: Which construct or line of your file.

resolved_how.description: How you decided what to write (guessed, inferred from example, pack sentence, gave up).

missing_from_docs.description: Things you reached for in the candidate pack and did not find. Empty array if none.

missing_from_language.description: Things you wanted to express and the language seemed to have no way to say. Empty array if none.

error_messages.description: Each checker error you were shown, and whether it told you what to do. Empty array if the check passed first try.

what_would_have_helped.description: Empty string if it was already good.

would_change.description: Concrete changes you would make to the language or docs, most important first. Empty array if none.

confidence_before_check.description: Before seeing the checker's verdict: how confident were you the file would pass?
